svg.text: GlassBench real-data acquisition design
The next experiment is decomposed into member-power, event-clock inversion, and late-recovery mechanism panels; pooled particles do not replace independent members.
rank
acquisition panel
required data and claim unlocked
multi temperature threshold sweep member panel
stage=member power extension required
additional members=4; additional lags=2; pooled substitution=0
unlocks: threshold=1; PE inversion=0; mechanism=0; thermo=0
payload=physical time axis;nonrecrossing cage jump rule;member level threshold sensitivity;member level
physical time event clock inversion panel
stage=real pe inversion panel required
additional members=0; additional lags=0; pooled substitution=0
unlocks: threshold=0; PE inversion=1; mechanism=0; thermo=0
payload=frame time mapping;lag time;sigma msd;sigma ngp 2d;sigma self intermediate scattering by k;sigma
tc50 late recovery mechanism power panel
stage=late recovery member power extension required
additional members=120; additional lags=0; pooled substitution=0
unlocks: threshold=0; PE inversion=0; mechanism=1; thermo=0
payload=observe tc50 late ngp;sigma late ngp;late self van hove tail;exchange clock fit
